summary: Dataset passed all critical checks. 20,000 rows, no missing values, no duplicates, 2 categorical-like columns, 1 text column. One soft warning: only 5 raw features exist pre-vectorization (below the 10-feature threshold), but this is expected — TF-IDF expansion of 'reviewText' will produce hundreds of additional features. Minor outliers detected in 'exclamation_count' and 'uppercase_ratio' (informational only).

feature_count_gte_10.note: Pre-vectorization count only. TF-IDF on 'reviewText' will produce hundreds of additional features, satisfying this requirement at training time.

target_distribution.note: Mild class imbalance (76/24 split). Consider class_weight='balanced' or oversampling if model performance on minority class is poor.

outliers.note: Outliers in 'exclamation_count' and 'uppercase_ratio' are plausible for real review data (e.g., very enthusiastic reviews). No action required unless model performance is affected.

issues: WARN: Only 5 raw features before vectorization (threshold: 10). This is expected — TF-IDF on 'reviewText' will satisfy the feature count requirement at training time.

llm_decision.reason: No critical issues found. Zero missing values, zero duplicates, 20,000 rows (4x the minimum), valid text column present, and 2 categorical-like columns. The low raw feature count is a pre-vectorization artifact and not a blocking issue.

notes.trainer: Apply TF-IDF vectorization to 'reviewText' before training to satisfy the 10-feature requirement and unlock the primary signal. Consider using class_weight='balanced' due to the 76/24 class split. Outliers in 'exclamation_count' and 'uppercase_ratio' are minor and likely real signal — no clipping needed unless ablation shows otherwise.
